audit_items.proof_trace: The second loop iterates exclusively over `verifiedReports.length` and accesses only `verifiedReports[i]`, never cross-indexing with `unverifiedReports` — the OOB claim is factually incorrect. Silent truncation (if verifyBulk returns fewer items) is a theoretical protocol-level concern only; the Chainlink VerifierProxy is an immutable trusted contract that reverts on individual report failures rather than silently dropping items, so the 1:1 length guarantee holds by protocol design.
